sacco

Class ShapeOrganizer

  • java.lang.Object
    • sacco.SaccoObject
      • sacco.ShapeOrganizer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    sacco.DrawingBoard, sacco.KeyboardListener, sacco.MouseListener

    public class ShapeOrganizer
extends sacco.SaccoObject

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ShapeOrganizer()
      Constructs a ShapeOrganizer with the default colors and locations

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void hideCircle()
      Causes the circle to be invisible
      void hideGrid()
      Causes the coordinate grid to be hidden
      void hideRectangle()
      Causes the rectangle to be invisible
      void hideTriangle()
      Causes the triangle to be invisible
      void paintWindow(sacco.PaintBrush brush)
      Used internally to paint the shapes on the window
      void setCircleColor(java.lang.String color)
      Sets the color of the circle based on the String passed in as the parameter
      void setCircleRadius(int radius)
      Sets the radius of the circle to the value passed in as the parameter
      void setCircleX(int x)
      Sets the x coordinate of the circle (upper-left corner) to the value passed in as the parameter
      void setCircleY(int y)
      Sets the y coordinate of the circle (upper-left corner) to the value passed in as the parameter
      void setRectangleColor(java.lang.String color)
      Sets the color of the rectangle based on the String passed in as the parameter
      void setRectangleHeight(int height)
      Sets the height of the rectangle to the value passed in as the parameter
      void setRectangleWidth(int width)
      Sets the width of the rectangle to the value passed in as the parameter
      void setRectangleX(int x)
      Sets the x coordinate of the rectangle (upper-left corner) to the value passed in as the parameter
      void setRectangleY(int y)
      Sets the y coordinate of the rectangle (upper-left corner) to the value passed in as the parameter
      void setTriangleBase(int base)
      Sets the base of the triangle to the value passed in as the parameter
      void setTriangleColor(java.lang.String color)
      Sets the color of the triangle based on the String passed in as the parameter
      void setTriangleHeight(int height)
      Sets the height of the triangle to the value passed in as the parameter
      void setTriangleX(int x)
      Sets the x coordinate of the triangle (upper-left corner) to the value passed in as the parameter
      void setTriangleY(int y)
      Sets the y coordinate of the triangle (upper-left corner) to the value passed in as the parameter
      void showCircle()
      Causes the circle to be visible
      void showGrid()
      Causes the coordinate grid to be displayed
      void showRectangle()
      Causes the rectangle to be visible
      void showTriangle()
      Causes the triangle to be visible

      • setCircleColor

        public void setCircleColor(java.lang.String color)
        Sets the color of the circle based on the String passed in as the parameter
        Parameters:
